issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu panels are hidden without setting `aria‑hidden`
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown panel is closed (`_closeInstance`), the code only adds the `hidden` attribute after a timeout but never sets `aria‑hidden="true"`. The element remains in the accessibility tree while visually hidden, so screen‑reader users can still navigate to it.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close actions are not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The functions `_openInstance` and `_closeInstance` update `aria‑expanded` on the trigger and toggle CSS classes, but they never write a message to a live region. Users of assistive technology receive no audible feedback that a menu has opened or closed.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger may lack required `aria-controls`
issuesFound.explanation: In `mobileNav.init()` the code adds `aria-controls` to the hamburger button **only if** the drawer element has an `id`. If the drawer does not have an `id`, the trigger ends up with `aria-expanded` but without a reference to the controlled region, breaking the disclosure pattern.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu panels are hidden with `hidden` but not removed from the accessibility tree when hidden via CSS class only
issuesFound.explanation: The `_closeInstance` function adds a CSS class to hide the panel (`CSS.open` removal) and later sets `hidden`. However, while the CSS class is removed (panel still present) there is a period where the panel is visually hidden but still focusable because `hidden` is not applied until after the transition. During that interval, keyboard users can tab into the hidden panel.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu toggle does not set `aria-pressed` on the trigger (two‑state button)
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown trigger button acts as a two‑state control (open/closed) but only updates `aria-expanded`. For button‑type controls that toggle a panel, `aria-pressed` should also reflect the pressed state to convey the toggle nature to assistive technology.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger button (`SELECTORS.navToggle`) toggles the off‑canvas drawer, but the script only adds `aria-controls` if the drawer element already has an `id`. The drawer (`SELECTORS.navDrawer` / `SELECTORS.primaryNav`) has no `id` in the markup, so the trigger ends up without `aria-controls`, breaking the relationship between the button and the region it controls.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation drawer hidden without aria‑hidden
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer is closed (`mobileNav.close()`), the code removes the open class but never sets `aria-hidden="true"` on the drawer. Relying only on CSS classes leaves the drawer in the accessibility tree, making its hidden state invisible to assistive technologies.

issuesFound.title: Pricing comparison table toggle missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The function `pricing.setComparisonTableExpanded()` shows or hides the comparison table but never links the controlling button (`[data-expand-comparison]`) to the table via `aria-controls`. Without this explicit relationship, screen‑reader users cannot discover that the button controls the table.

issuesFound.title: Product‑filter pagination changes not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: `_syncPagination()` updates the pagination text (`_paginationEl.textContent`) but does not send an announcement to a live region. Users of assistive technology receive no feedback that the page of results has changed.

issuesFound.title: Contact form validation errors do not set aria‑invalid (HIGH)
issuesFound.explanation: In `contactForm._onSubmit`, the code validates fields with `validateField` and, on failure, returns early without marking the offending inputs with `aria-invalid="true"`. Assistive technologies therefore cannot convey the error state to users.

issuesFound.fix:
When opening, call `setAttr(inst.panel, 'aria-hidden', 'false');` and when closing, `setAttr(inst.panel, 'aria-hidden', 'true');`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open/close not announced via live region (duplicate of Issue 10 but for FAQ)
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or collapsing a FAQ item does not write to a live region, leaving AT users unaware of the change.
issuesFound.fix: Add `liveRegion.announce(item.question + (item.open ? ' expanded' : ' collapsed'))` in the respective functions.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown hide uses off‑screen technique without aria‑hidden
issuesFound.explanation: If a dropdown’s panel is hidden by CSS class only (e.g., `dropdown--open` removed) without `hidden` or `aria‑hidden`, the panel remains in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: In `_closeInstance` add `panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true')` after the transition; in `_openInstance` remove that attribute.

fpTitles: View‑mode toggle button missing aria‑pressed update
Contact form fields missing aria‑invalid on validation error
FAQ accordion open/close not announced via live region (duplicate of Issue 10 but for FAQ)

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not update `aria‑expanded`
issuesFound.explanation: The hamburger button (`_trigger`) toggles the drawer’s visibility but never sets or updates `aria-expanded` to reflect the open/closed state, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the menu’s state.
issuesFound.fix:
Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` when opening and `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` when closing.

---

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing `aria-controls`
issuesFound.explanation: The trigger button controls the drawer (`_drawer`) but no `aria-controls` attribute is added, breaking the relationship required for assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix:
After locating the drawer, call `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'nav-drawer'))`.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger does not update `aria‑expanded`
issuesFound.explanation: Clicking a dropdown button toggles the panel’s visibility but never updates `aria-expanded` on the trigger, violating ARIA disclosure pattern.
issuesFound.fix:
After opening, `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; after closing, set to `'false'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu keyboard handler does not update `aria‑expanded`
issuesFound.explanation: Keyboard interactions (Enter/Space/Arrow) open/close the dropdown without synchronising `aria-expanded` on the trigger.
issuesFound.fix:
Mirror the changes made in `_onTriggerClick` – set `aria-expanded` appropriately.

---

issuesFound.title: Search input does not update `aria‑expanded` when suggestion panel opens
issuesFound.explanation: The combobox‑style search input shows the suggestion list but never sets `aria-expanded="true"` (or `"false"` when closed), breaking the ARIA combobox pattern.
issuesFound.fix:
In `_open()` call `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `_close()` set to `'false'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period buttons do not update `aria‑pressed`
issuesFound.explanation: Clicking a period button changes the UI but only toggles CSS classes; it never updates `aria‑pressed` to indicate the selected state.
issuesFound.fix:
After toggling, call `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(btn === activeBtn))` for each button.

---

issuesFound.title: Simple billing‑period toggle switch does not update `aria‑pressed`
issuesFound.explanation: The on/off toggle that switches between monthly and yearly billing updates visual state but never sets `aria‑pressed`, leaving assistive tech unaware of the current mode.
issuesFound.fix:
After toggling, set `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', String(isYear))`.

---

issuesFound.title: Inline validation does not clear `aria‑invalid` on valid fields
issuesFound.explanation: When a field becomes valid the code removes the error message but never removes the `aria-invalid` attribute, so the field remains marked invalid to AT.
issuesFound.fix:
In the “valid” branch add `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Drawer hidden via CSS does not receive `aria‑hidden`
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer is closed it receives a hidden class and `hidden` attribute, but no `aria-hidden="true"` is set, so the drawer remains in the accessibility tree.
issuesFound.fix: After hiding, call `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true')`; when opening, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle missing aria‑expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.open`, `mobileNav.close`, and `mobileNav.toggle` functions change the visibility of the mobile navigation drawer but never set or update the `aria‑expanded` attribute on the trigger button (`_trigger`). Screen‑reader users cannot know whether the menu is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: In each of these functions add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', String(_open))` (or the appropriate true/false value) after the visibility change.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing aria‑controls
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button (`_trigger`) does not have an `aria-controls` attribute that references the ID of the navigation drawer (`_drawer`). Without this reference assistive technologies cannot associate the button with the controlled region.
issuesFound.fix: After obtaining `_drawer`, ensure it has an ID (e.g., `srUtils.ensureId(_drawer)`) and set `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', _drawer.id)` during initialization.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open/close actions not announced to AT
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing the mobile navigation drawer emit custom events but do not write to a live‑region, so screen‑reader users receive no audible feedback.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened')`; after closing, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClose || 'Navigation menu closed')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `_openInstance` function adds the `open` class and removes `hidden` from the dropdown panel but never updates `aria-expanded` on the trigger button, leaving the state invisible to assistive tech.
issuesFound.fix: Inside `_openInstance`, after opening the panel, add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu close does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `_closeInstance` function hides the dropdown panel but does not set `aria-expanded="false"` on the trigger button.
issuesFound.fix: Inside `_closeInstance`, after closing the panel, add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open/close not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: Opening or closing a dropdown menu does not write to any `aria-live` region, so users are unaware of the change.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownOpened || 'Menu opened')`; after closing, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.dropdownClosed || 'Menu closed')`.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: `inlineValidator.validate` creates error messages but never sets `aria-invalid="true"` on the field when validation fails, breaking the required ARIA‑invalid mapping.
issuesFound.fix: When `!result.valid`, call `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true')` (or use `srUtils.markInvalid` which also sets the attribute).

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not clear aria‑invalid on valid fields
issuesFound.explanation: When a field becomes valid, the validator removes the error message but does not remove or set `aria-invalid="false"` on the field, leaving the invalid state lingering for assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: When `result.valid`, call `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid')` (or `srUtils.markValid` which does this).

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open/close not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The `faqAccordion.open` and `faqAccordion.close` functions expand/collapse FAQ panels but never write to a live‑region, so screen‑reader users receive no feedback.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqOpened(item.question) || `${item.question} – answer expanded`)`; after closing, call `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed(item.question) || `${item.question} – answer collapsed`)`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle does not announce period change
issuesFound.explanation: Changing the billing period with `pricing.setPeriod` updates UI but does not announce the new period to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: After updating prices, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.pricingPeriodChanged?.replace('{period}', BILLING_PERIODS[period].label) || `Billing period changed to ${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label}`)`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle button lacks aria‑pressed update
issuesFound.explanation: The toggle element (`_toggleEl`) changes visual state but never updates `aria-pressed` to reflect the current period (monthly vs. annual).
issuesFound.fix: In `_onToggleClick` (or after `setPeriod`), call `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', String(_pricingState.period === 'year'))`.

issuesFound.title: Search results count update not announced via live region (already handled) – actually siteSearch does announce. So skip.
Theme switcher toggle does not set aria‑pressed on buttons
issuesFound.explanation: Theme toggle buttons (`[data-theme-toggle]`) change the theme but only set `aria-pressed` on init; when the theme is changed via `themeSwitcher.toggle()` the `aria-pressed` state is not updated for all buttons.
issuesFound.fix: After changing the theme, iterate over all `[data-theme-toggle]` buttons and set `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(btn.getAttribute('data-theme-toggle') === newPref))`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation overlay hide does not set aria‑hidden
issuesFound.explanation: When the overlay is hidden, it is only given the `hidden` attribute; because it remains in the DOM, screen readers may still expose it.
issuesFound.fix: After hiding, add `setAttr(_overlay, 'aria-hidden', 'true')`; when showing, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation open does not set aria‑hidden on drawer
issuesFound.explanation: The drawer is shown by adding a class but never has `aria-hidden="false"` removed, so AT may still consider it hidden.
issuesFound.fix: After opening, call `removeAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden')`; on close, set `setAttr(_drawer, 'aria-hidden', 'true')`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu toggle functions do not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The functions `openInstance` and `closeInstance` (lines 1062‑1085) toggle the visibility of a dropdown panel but never set or clear the `aria‑expanded` attribute on the trigger button, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the panel state.
issuesFound.fix:
Add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', String(isOpen))` (or `'true'`/`'false'`) inside both `openInstance` and `closeInstance` after the panel is shown/hidden.

---

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open/close functions do not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `open` and `close` functions of the FAQ accordion (lines 2154‑2187) add/remove CSS classes and animate the answer panel but never modify `aria‑expanded` on the question button, breaking the disclosure pattern for assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix:
In `open(item,…)` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `close(item,…)` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Mobile‑nav trigger missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: In `mobileNav.init` the hamburger button (`_trigger`) is never given an initial `aria‑expanded="false"` value, so its collapsed state is not exposed to AT on page load.
issuesFound.fix:
After locating `_trigger`, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown‑menu triggers missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: During `register(trigger, panel)` the trigger receives `aria-controls` but no initial `aria‑expanded` attribute, leaving its default state undefined for screen readers.
issuesFound.fix:
After `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId)`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

---

issuesFound.title: FAQ triggers missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: `faqRegistry.parse` sets `aria-controls` on each FAQ question button but does not set an initial `aria‑expanded="false"` attribute, so the collapsed state is not announced.
issuesFound.fix:
After `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId)`, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors are not reflected in aria‑invalid
issuesFound.explanation: `inlineValidator.validate` marks fields as invalid visually but never sets `aria‑invalid="true"` on the offending input, so AT does not know the field is invalid.
issuesFound.fix:
In `inlineValidator.validate`, when `!result.valid` add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true')`; when valid, remove the attribute.

---

issuesFound.title: Valid inputs do not have aria‑invalid cleared
issuesFound.explanation: After a field becomes valid, the validator only removes error text but leaves any existing `aria‑invalid` attribute untouched, causing persistent invalid state for AT.
issuesFound.fix:
In the same validator, on the success path call `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid')`.

---

issuesFound.title: Mobile‑nav open/close actions are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: `mobileNav.open` and `mobileNav.close` change the navigation drawer visibility but never announce the change to screen readers. Users relying on AT receive no feedback that the menu opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
After the drawer state change, call `liveRegion.announce('Navigation menu opened')` (or `'closed'`).

---

issuesFound.title: Dropdown‑menu open/close actions are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: `openInstance` and `closeInstance` toggle dropdown panels without any live‑region announcement, leaving AT users unaware of the menu state change.
issuesFound.fix:
After showing/hiding the panel, call `liveRegion.announce('Menu expanded')` or `'Menu collapsed'` accordingly.

---

issuesFound.title: FAQ item open/close actions are not announced via a live region
issuesFound.explanation: The `open` and `close` functions of the FAQ accordion update the UI but do not provide an audible cue via a live region, so screen‑reader users cannot tell when an answer is revealed or hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
After changing the panel state, call `liveRegion.announce(`${item.question} expanded`)` or `'collapsed'`.

---

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle does not announce the change
issuesFound.explanation: Switching billing periods updates UI and prices but never informs screen‑reader users of the new period, violating WCAG 2.2 (ARIA live region) guidance.
issuesFound.fix:
At the end of `setPeriod`, add `liveRegion.announce(`Billing period set to ${BILLING_PERIODS[period].label}`)`.

---

issuesFound.title: View‑mode toggle buttons do not announce the mode change
issuesFound.explanation: Clicking a view‑mode button switches between grid and list layouts without any live‑region feedback, so AT users cannot perceive the layout change.
issuesFound.fix: After updating classes, call `liveRegion.announce(`View mode changed to ${mode} view`)`.

issuesFound.fix:

